no: Teleport Without Error spell by Razfallow (updated by Endarire). v16 (Jul 2023). 7th level arcane spell that teleports party to previously visited areas. Uses OlvynChuru Class Spell Tool for intermod compatibility. Note: GitHub repo is documentation-only — mod files are in the release ZIP

cl.m: Added from Infinity Insanity WeiDU logs

new: Teleports party to a previously visited location.

sum: Teleport without Error Spell for BG2, BG2EE, and EET by Razfallow and updated by others.  The latest version uses OlvynChuru's Class Spell Tool to aid with intermod compatibility.

co.no: HARD FAIL: tp2 declares 'Cesky' (Czech) language without a charset declaration; WeiDU v251 cannot infer ISO-8859-2 encoding and exits with 'ERROR: charset could not be inferred for language cesky'. Czech-only mod — no fix possible on English installation.
HARD FAIL: same Czech charset inference failure as cn:0.

co.n: Modification of NPCs and strongholds quests.
co.no: HARD FAIL: same Czech charset inference failure as cn:0.
